principles.label: Personal Data Protection Principles
principles.description: Offences related to contraventions of the seven data protection principles under Part II Division 1

registration.label: Registration of Data Users
registration.description: Offences relating to the failure to register as a data user or processing personal data without valid registration, as required under Part II Division 2

processing.label: Processing of Personal Data
processing.description: Offences related to unlawful or improper processing, including failure to comply with data subject rights and failure to appoint a Data Protection Officer

disclosure.label: Unauthorized Disclosure
disclosure.description: Offences involving the unauthorized or unlawful disclosure of personal data, whether by data users, their employees, or by the Commissioner and regulatory officers

enforcement.label: Enforcement and Investigation
enforcement.description: Offences that obstruct, impede, or undermine the enforcement functions of the Commissioner and authorized officers, including obstruction, false statements, and non-compliance with enforcement notices

data-breach.label: Data Breach Notification
data-breach.description: Offences related to the mandatory data breach notification obligations introduced by the 2024 Amendment Act, including failure to notify the Commissioner within 72 hours and failure to notify affected data subjects

cross-border.label: Cross-Border Personal Data Transfer
cross-border.description: Offences related to the unlawful transfer of personal data outside Malaysia without complying with the requirements under s129A, including transfers to non-approved countries and failure to implement adequate safeguards

general.label: General and Miscellaneous Penalties
general.description: General penalty provisions, continuing offence provisions, and body corporate liability provisions that apply across all categories of offences
